note: Seeded loaded for the internal-pool demos (36/37) with a scale_to_zero autoscale policy: the placement controller wakes it on the first starved-demand signal off the router /metrics and idle-evicts it back to zero after the warm window. The dev model runner serves qwen3.5:9b (the OLLAMA_MODEL default); served through internal_pool_router → the in-cluster inference router.
